name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: Cincinnati, OH - 5 Star Car Title Loans at 6713 Montgomery Rd provides same-day car title loans and cash advances in your neighborhood.
description_long:
The Cincinnati, OH location of 5 Star Car Title Loans is situated at 6713 Montgomery Rd, serving the Montgomery community and surrounding neighborhoods. This storefront is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, with Saturday hours from 10AM to 5PM, and closed on Sundays. This physical location is designed for walk-in customers who need quick access to car title loan services in the Cincinnati area.

At the Cincinnati location on Montgomery Rd, you can apply for car title loans, emergency cash advances, and auto title pawns. The staff here understands the needs of Cincinnati residents and can answer questions about loan terms, required documentation, and approval timelines. Contact this location directly at +1 513-902-3855 to discuss your specific situation or apply over the phone.

If you're a Cincinnati resident looking for fast cash against your vehicle title, bring your valid ID, vehicle title, and proof of residence when you visit. Most applicants can complete the process in under an hour. 5 Star Car Title Loans focuses on accessible lending for people who need immediate funds.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding for approved applicants
Loan amounts up to $50,000, higher than typical emergency loans
Borrowers keep possession and use of their vehicle during the loan term
No prepayment penalties, allowing early repayment without extra fees
Available in approximately 18 states with both online and in-person applications
Accepts alternative collateral beyond cars (motorcycles, semi-trucks)
Licensed and regulated lender operating since 2012 with 255K+ loans funded
cons: Website does not disclose APR, interest rates, or typical monthly payments—critical terms are hidden
Title loans carry high repossession risk if payments are missed
No clear explanation of fees, origination costs, or total cost of borrowing
Customer reviews are limited (only 11 reviews) and housed on company website, lacking third-party verification
High-cost debt product designed to extract value from borrowers unable to access traditional credit
best_for: Vehicle owners with sudden emergency expenses and no access to credit cards or personal loans
Self-employed or gig workers without traditional credit history who need fast capital
Borrowers with poor credit who cannot qualify for unsecured personal loans but own a vehicle with equity
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is best suited for vehicle owners facing genuine emergency cash needs who have exhausted other borrowing options and understand the risks of title-secured debt. The critical caveat is that APR and total cost of borrowing are entirely absent from public disclosures—borrowers must obtain complete loan terms before applying, as title loans are among the costliest consumer credit products available.
services: Installment loans with up to 24-month terms
In-person loan applications at physical locations
Fast approval process (decisions within minutes claimed)
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 6713 Montgomery Rd, Cincinnati, OH. Fast car title loans with same-day approval and competitive rates.
